pages.title: Pig
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Pig donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Saddle-capable torso:$(warn) shears strip saddles like vanilla livestock — consult Dominion chapter for riding notes.$(br2)$(aside)Torso is saddled — pigs remain iconic mounts for stitched mash-ups.
